È stata presentata una denuncia per crimini di guerra alla Corte Penale Internazionale all'Aia contro il primo ministro spagnolo Pedro Sánchez.
All'origine di questa iniziativa c'è Shurat HaDin. L’accusa é di sostenere indirettamente Teheran attraverso la fornitura di componenti a duplice uso.

data.body:
"[...] authorities in the UAE have downplayed damage, mischaracterised interceptions and in some instances not acknowledged successful Iranian drone strikes on the country."

"the UAE’s attorney general warned that publication of images or videos of strikes was illegal."
data.author: did:plc:vb45t26uj7zxt22smtumqa2k

data.body:
"People were also encouraged to report anyone sharing photos or videos of the strikes to authorities. 

The country’s attorney general has ordered the arrest of 35 people and said they would face an expedited trial"
data.author: did:plc:vb45t26uj7zxt22smtumqa2k

data.body: "Separately police in Abu Dhabi reported they had arrested just over 100 people on suspicion of filming incidents related to Iran’s attacks on the UAE and sharing misleading information online."
data.author: did:plc:vb45t26uj7zxt22smtumqa2k

data.body: "Dubai Police issued similar warnings on social media, stating that sharing content that contradicts official announcements could lead to imprisonment of at least two years and fines of no less than 200,000 dirhams (approximately $55,000)."
data.author: did:plc:vb45t26uj7zxt22smtumqa2k

data.body: Deniz Sağdıç redefine el desecho mediante la pareidolia. Su arte usa cables y textiles para que el cerebro proyecte rostros donde solo hay residuos. Al priorizar la luminancia sobre el caos material, demuestra que el valor no se pierde, sino que se transforma según nuestra percepción visual.
